ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "population_2010" INTEGER /* Population of the country in 2010 */,
  "population_2030" INTEGER /* Projected population of the country in 2030 */,
  "gdp_2010" REAL /* GDP of the country in 2010 (in US$ Billion PPP) */,
  "gdp_2030" REAL /* Projected GDP of the country in 2030 (in US$ Billion PPP) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the country */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "climate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate data record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the climate data */,
  "climate_total_2010" TEXT /* Climate condition severity in 2010 */,
  "climate_total_2030" TEXT /* Projected climate condition severity in 2030 */,
  "temperature_2010" REAL /* Average temperature in 2010 (°C) */,
  "temperature_2030" REAL /* Projected average temperature in 2030 (°C) */,
  "precipitation_2010" REAL /* Average precipitation in 2010 (mm) */,
  "precipitation_2030" REAL /* Projected average precipitation in 2030 (mm) */,
  "sea_level_2010" REAL /* Sea level in 2010 (m) */,
  "sea_level_2030" REAL /* Projected sea level in 2030 (m) */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the climate model used for projections */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("climate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for which costs are recorded */,
  "cost_2010" REAL /* Cost of climate impacts in 2010 (in US$ Million PPP) */,
  "cost_2030" REAL /* Projected cost of climate impacts in 2030 (in US$ Million PPP) */,
  "gdp_impact_2010" REAL /* Percentage of GDP impacted by climate in 2010 */,
  "gdp_impact_2030" REAL /* Projected percentage of GDP impacted by climate in 2030 */,
  "healthcare_costs_2010" REAL /* Healthcare costs related to climate impacts in 2010 (in US$ Million PPP) */,
  "healthcare_costs_2030" REAL /* Projected healthcare costs related to climate impacts in 2030 (in US$ Million PPP) */,
  "infrastructure_costs_2010" REAL /* Infrastructure costs related to climate impacts in 2010 (in US$ Million PPP) */,
  "infrastructure_costs_2030" REAL /* Projected infrastructure costs related to climate impacts in 2030 (in US$ Million PPP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_costs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_rates" (
  "mortality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for which mortality data is recorded */,
  "mortality_2010" INTEGER /* Number of deaths attributed to climate conditions in 2010 */,
  "mortality_2030" INTEGER /* Projected number of deaths attributed to climate conditions in 2030 */,
  "age_distribution_2010" TEXT /* Age distribution of deaths in 2010 */,
  "age_distribution_2030" TEXT /* Projected age distribution of deaths in 2030 */,
  "cause_of_death_2010" TEXT /* Primary causes of deaths in 2010 */,
  "cause_of_death_2030" TEXT /* Projected primary causes of deaths in 2030 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mortality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or characteristics of the region */,
  "population_2010" INTEGER /* Population of the region in 2010 */,
  "population_2030" INTEGER /* Projected population of the region in 2030 */,
  "gdp_2010" REAL /* GDP of the region in 2010 (in US$ Billion PPP) */,
  "gdp_2030" REAL /* Projected GDP of the region in 2030 (in US$ Billion PPP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's approach and methodology */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projection record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the climate model used for projection */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country related to the projection */,
  "climate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the climate data record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the projection */,
  "projected_cost" REAL /* Projected cost of climate impacts in the specified year (in US$ Million PPP) */,
  "projected_mortality" INTEGER /* Projected mortality count for the specified year */,
  "gdp_impact" REAL /* Projected percentage of GDP impact */,
  "healthcare_costs" REAL /* Projected healthcare costs */,
  "infrastructure_costs" REAL /* Projected infrastructure costs */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Projected age distribution of deaths */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Projected primary causes of deaths */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the climate model used for the projection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projections_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projections_climate_id FOREIGN KEY ("climate_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("climate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projections_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES climate_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "climate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data being accessed */,
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic cost data being accessed */,
  "mortality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mortality data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cost_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_id") REFERENCES economic_costs ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_mortality_id FOREIGN KEY ("mortality_id") REFERENCES mortality_rates ("mortality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_climate_id FOREIGN KEY ("climate_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("climate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report content */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to access the report */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the report file (e.g., PDF, CSV, DOCX) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the report was last modified */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
